{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/250560052?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kolega-ai-dev/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kolega-ai-dev/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kolega-ai-dev/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kolega-ai-dev/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/kolega-ai-dev", "id": 250560052, "login": "kolega-ai-dev", "node_id": "U_kgDODu8-NA", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kolega-ai-dev/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kolega-ai-dev/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kolega-ai-dev/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kolega-ai-dev/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kolega-ai-dev/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/kolega-ai-dev", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-56272", "cvss": {"score": 4.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.0/AV:L/AC:H/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.0/AV:L/AC:H/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-328", "name": "Use of Weak Hash"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-916", "name": "Use of Password Hash With Insufficient Computational Effort"}], "description": "### Description
The default bcrypt salt rounds is set to 5, which is below the recommended minimum for security.

### Affected Code
```
export function getHash(value: string) {
    const salt = bcrypt.genSaltSync(parseInt(process.env.PASSWORD_SALT_HASH_ROUNDS || '5'))
    return bcrypt.hashSync(value, salt)
}
```

### Evidence
Using 5 salt rounds provides 2^5 = 32 iterations, which is far below the OWASP recommendation of 10 (2^10 = 1024 iterations) for bcrypt. This makes password hashes vulnerable to brute-force attacks with modern hardware.

### Impact
Faster password cracking - in the event of database compromise, attackers can crack password hashes significantly faster than with proper salt rounds, potentially compromising all user accounts.

### Recommendation
Increase default PASSWORD_SALT_HASH_ROUNDS to at least 10 (recommended by OWASP). Consider using 12 for better security-performance balance. Document that higher values increase login time but improve security.

### Notes
The default bcrypt salt rounds is 5 (line 6), which provides only 2^5=32 iterations. OWASP recommends minimum 10 rounds (1024 iterations) for bcrypt. While configurable via PASSWORD_SALT_HASH_ROUNDS env var, the default matters because: (1) most deployments use defaults, (2) existing password hashes at 5 rounds remain vulnerable even if later increased. With modern GPUs, 5 rounds allows ~300,000 hashes/second vs ~10,000/second at 10 rounds - a 30x difference in cracking speed. In a database breach scenario, all user passwords could be cracked significantly faster. The same weak default is used in resetPassword (account.service.ts:568). This is a cryptographic weakness with real-world impact on password security.

**Detection Method:** Kolega.dev Deep Code Scan

| Attribute | Value |
|---|---|
| Severity | Medium |
| CWE | CWE-916 (Use of Password Hash With Insufficient Computational Effort) |
| Location | packages/server/src/enterprise/utils/encryption.util.ts:5-7 |
| Practical Exploitability | Medium |
| Developer Approver | faizan@kolega.ai |", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00073, "percentile": 0.00097}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-x2g5-fvc2-gqvp", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-05T21:54:31Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x2g5-fvc2-gqvp", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-x2g5-fvc2-gqvp"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-56272"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-03-05T21:54:31Z", "references": ["https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise/security/advisories/GHSA-x2g5-fvc2-gqvp", "https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise/pull/5665", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x2g5-fvc2-gqvp"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/FlowiseAI/Flowise/security-advisories/GHSA-x2g5-fvc2-gqvp", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise", "summary": "Flowise has Insufficient Password Salt Rounds", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-24T13:06:52Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-x2g5-fvc2-gqvp", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.0.13", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "flowise"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 3.0.12"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Flowise has Insufficient Password Salt Rounds
